ai_role: Electrical equipment, power distribution, and grid infrastructure for AI data centers
tvs_tiebreaker: Infrastructure chokepoint durability can support ownership even if it screens as old-economy rather than classic ARK growth.
technical_timing_rule: Technicals guide add pacing; fundamental backlog and electrical demand matter more for core sizing.
rationale: Eaton benefits from AI data-center electrification, power distribution, and grid bottlenecks. It is diversified, but valuation and infrastructure-cycle timing matter.
